visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) The video begins in a brightly lit Costco warehouse environment. A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black top with sheer puff sleeves and a heart necklace, stands in front of a refrigerated bakery display. She holds a large, boxed strawberry pistachio cake, pointing at the fresh strawberries visible through the lid. The camera captures close-up shots of the cake, emphasizing the dusting of powdered sugar on the fruits and the green tint of the pistachio cream. (2) A transition shot shows a single slice of the cake on a pink plate. The cross-section reveals distinct layers of yellow sponge, thick green pistachio mousse, and a vibrant red strawberry jam layer. The lighting shifts to a softer, warmer indoor residential tone. (3) Two women are seated at a white table in a modern apartment. The woman in black is joined by another woman wearing a white collared shirt and a blue beret. They gesture enthusiastically while speaking. Multiple cutaway shots show them using a metal server to lift a slice of the cake, highlighting the density and texture of the ingredients as they prepare to taste it.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Subtitle]: 請問誰生日了嗎? (2) [Subtitle]: 有人生日嗎? 為什麼要買蛋糕? (3) [Slogan]: 大家都是新生. [Subtitle]: 新的一年 大家都是新生. (4) [Subtitle]: 新生 我們都是新生兒. (5) [Slogan]: 499元值得? [Variety]: 草莓開心果蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 八吋的草莓開心果蛋糕 499. (6) [Subtitle]: 開心果加草莓. (7) [Subtitle]: 哇 草莓真的很大耶 比我的大拇哥還要大. (8) [Subtitle]: 但是好像只有上面這六顆 下面是草莓醬這樣. (9) [Subtitle]: OK 我們回去看看好不好吃. (10) [Subtitle]: 它非常的漂亮 看起來真的好好吃喔. (11) [Slogan]: 草莓開心果大蛋糕 8寸一公斤 這樣只要499元. [Subtitle]: 草莓開心果大蛋糕 8寸一公斤 這樣只要499元. (12) [Subtitle]: 然後草莓非常的大 然後吃起來非常得香甜. (13) [Variety]: 口感也非常的好. [Subtitle]: 開心果慕斯呢 口感也非常好. (14) [Subtitle]: 吃起來很開心. (15) [Subtitle]: 但是她的草莓醬呢 我們個人認為有點太多. (16) [Subtitle]: 所以整體的那個糕體變得有點太甜太紮實. (17) [Subtitle]: 然後糕體沒有那種蛋糕棉軟蓬鬆的夢幻感. (18) [Subtitle]: 反而加上是那種傳統糕餅店那種太紮實. (19) [Subtitle]: 為了吃粗飽的那種很紮實的糕體感. (20) [Variety]: 草莓醬太甜. [Subtitle]: 然後草莓醬太甜. (21) [Subtitle]: 希望可以改成那種比較爽口的覆盆莓果醬會更清爽. (22) [Variety]: 8寸大蛋糕. [Subtitle]: 可是整體來說 不用500塊可以有一個8寸大蛋糕. (23) [Subtitle]: 我們給七分 CP值很高. (24) [Subtitle]: 如果喜歡開心果味道的人 他的慕斯量真給的很誠意. (25) [Subtitle]: 或是自己洗很多草莓 然後就會很清爽把它塞滿.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 female main characters reviewing the product.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long black hair wearing a black puff-sleeve top; the other has dark hair with a blue beret and a white shirt.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: Starts in a Costco bakery section with metal shelving and refrigerated displays; moves to a brightly lit modern living room with a white table and neutral walls.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) The audio begins with a high-pitched female voice speaking energetically in Mandarin. A bright, electronic pop BGM with a steady 4/4 beat and prominent synthetic percussion sets an upbeat mood immediately. (2) As the scene transitions, a second female voice with a similar energetic tone enters the mix. The dialogue is fast-paced, with both voices showing high arousal and frequent pitch modulation. The BGM maintains a consistent volume underneath the speech. (3) During the tasting segment, the acoustic environment is clean, with the sound of a metallic fork lightly clinking against a ceramic plate audible during brief lulls in talking. The voices express satisfaction through rising intonations. (4) The final segment features overlapping speech as both women summarize their rating. The BGM continues until a hard cut at the end of the video, maintaining high spectral brightness throughout.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Hook -> Product Intro -> Detailed Tasting -> Conclusion/Score
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review the new Strawberry Pistachio Cake from Costco, evaluating its visual appeal, price value, and taste texture to provide a recommendation to viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: A consumer-led product review without explicit brand sponsorship disclosure.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-quality social media style edit with fast cuts and synchronized text overlays to maintain viewer engagement.
